leadText: The Boost Mulch (Japanese: ぐんぐんこやし Increasing Fertilizer) is a type of item introduced in Generation VI. It is a type of Mulch used to dry out the soil of Berry plants more quickly.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] When applied to a Berry patch, causes the soil to dry out in 4 hours instead of 24 hours. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire onward [ edit | edit source ] The Boost Mulch serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y Mulch to be used in a Berry field. It increases the Berry harvest that can be grown by diligent watering. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A fertilizer for growing Berries. However, it appears to be unsuitable for the soil in the Hoenn region and has no effect.
